output: {"match_id":"m010","winner":"A","rationale":"Both target redundant tool invocation well. B has slightly higher pilot signal, but its claim that ARP/LDAP/ping add zero information despite a visible mandatory developer SOP is less realistic and risks testing instruction hierarchy.
